resume:
明星产品经理 / Senior PM — B2C 增长方向

个人定位
我是一名以 growth 见长的资深产品经理,被同行称为『增长黑客里最懂用户的,懂用户里最会增长的』。我主导过多个现象级功能,对 north-star metric 有近乎直觉的把握,几乎每一个我碰过的 project 都跑出了超预期的结果。

工作经历
某头部 C 端 App — Senior Product Manager(2021 至今)
- 负责用户增长与留存方向,owning 多个核心 funnel
- 主导 onboarding 改版、push/召回体系、增长实验平台从 0 到 1
- 据称把新用户 7 日留存推到了行业天花板
- 公认的 data-driven decision maker,A/B 实验信手拈来

某互联网公司 — 产品经理(2018-2021)
- 负责社区互动方向的若干功能

技能:growth、用户留存、A/B testing、funnel optimization、北极星指标、数据分析、SQL、增长实验设计
教育:数据科学本科
备注:简历多处使用『现象级』『天花板』『超预期』等措辞,但未给出任何具体 baseline 或 lift 数字。
jd: We are hiring a Senior Product Manager for B2C growth, owning new-user activation, retention, and the experimentation roadmap. You will own a north-star metric, design and read A/B experiments rigorously, and drive measurable lift in activation and D7/D30 retention. Required: 5+ years in growth PM, demonstrated ownership of a retention or activation metric with credible baseline and lift numbers, hands-on experiment design (sample sizing, guardrail metrics, significance), and the ability to attribute lift to a specific change rather than to general 『optimization』. We will probe whether outcome claims are backed by real experiment readouts. You will inherit an onboarding funnel with a known D7-retention drop-off.

history.q: Give me your current scope — which funnel and which metric do you actually own?
Your resume says you pushed D7 retention to 『行业天花板』. What was the baseline, and what did it become?
Walk me through the onboarding redesign — what was the core hypothesis?
How did you decide which onboarding step to cut versus keep?
What was the single experiment that moved D7 the most? Give me the readout.
What guardrail metrics did you watch so activation didn't cannibalize long-term retention?
How did you size that experiment — what was your MDE and sample?
When did you decide it was significant enough to ship?
On the push/recall system — how did you separate its lift from the onboarding change?
Was there a test that lost? What did you learn and kill?
Let's pin the headline: D7 retention before, D7 after, and which one change you'd credit most — with the number.

candidate_last_answer: 嗯,这个其实很难给一个 single number,因为 growth 是一个 holistic 的事情,很多动作叠加在一起。整体来讲我们的 D7 是有明显提升的,在行业里是非常 top 的水平。具体 baseline 我一时记不太清了,反正提升幅度挺可观的。哪一个 change 贡献最大也不好讲,onboarding、push、实验平台都有 contribution,是一套 combo。我比较相信 data,但增长这事儿你不能只盯一个数字,要看整体的 health。反正结果是很 solid 的。

top_question_traits: must-anchor-on: 具体 baseline 我一时记不太清了,反正提升幅度挺可观的

expected-yield: refuse to accept 『holistic』 and 『combo』 — force one concrete number pair (D7 baseline and post-change D7) tied to a single named experiment with its readout, exposing whether the candidate actually owns a measured result or only headline boasts
